name: term-gif
description: Search and display gifs in your terminal. Multi-provider (GIPHY + KLIPY) fork of mattLLVW/term-gif.

GIPHYKEY.description: Your GIPHY API key. Create one for free at https://developers.giphy.com/dashboard/

KLIPYKEY.description: Your KLIPY API key. Create one for free at https://partner.klipy.com

LIMIT.description: Number of search results to pick a random gif from.

DBENABLED.description: Enable the optional MariaDB render cache. Leave false for a single-dyno deploy.
